import PersistentDecomp.Mathlib.Order.Disjoint
import PersistentDecomp.Prereqs.Indecomposable
import PersistentDecomp.Prereqs.PersistenceSubmodule

/-!

# Direct sum decompositions for persistence modules (dual order version)

In this file, we define the type of direct sum decompositions of a persistence module `M`.
This has a natural order given by refinements.

Relation to the material in `PersistentDecomp.DirectSumDecompositionDual.lean`:
here, we are considering the *dual order* of the one constructed in the other file.

-/

open CategoryTheory CategoryTheory.Limits DirectSum
open CompleteLattice hiding sSup_le -- TODO: Fix in mathlib

namespace Dual

variable {C : Type} [Category.{0, 0} C] {K : Type} [DivisionRing K] {M : C в•§ ModuleCat K}

variable (M) in
/-- A direct sum decomposition of `M ` is a set of non-zero submodules
that are linearly independent and whose supremum is the whole of `M`. -/
@[ext]
structure DirectSumDecomposition where
  carrier : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M)
  sSupIndep' : sSupIndep carrier
  sSup_eq_top' : sSup carrier = вК§
  not_bot_mem' : вК• вИЙ carrier

namespace DirectSumDecomposition

instance : SetLike (DirectSumDecomposition M) (PersistenceSubmodule M) where
  coe := carrier
  coe_injective' DвВБ DвВВ := by cases DвВБ; congr!

attribute [-instance] SetLike.instPartialOrder

protected lemma sSupIndep (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) : sSupIndep (SetLike.coe D) := D.sSupIndep'

lemma sSup_eq_top (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) : sSup (SetLike.coe D) = вК§ := D.sSup_eq_top'
lemma not_bot_mem (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) : вК• вИЙ D := D.not_bot_mem'

lemma pointwise_iSup_eq_top (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) (x : C) : в®Ж p вИИ D, p x = вК§ := sorry

lemma pointwise_sSup_eq_top (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) (x : C) : в®Ж p вИИ D, p x = вК§ := sorry

open scoped Classical in
lemma isInternal (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (c : C) :
    IsInternal (M := M.obj c) (S := Submodule K (M.obj c)) fun p : I вЖ¶ p.val c := by
  rw [DirectSum.isInternal_submodule_iff_iSupIndep_and_iSup_eq_top]
  constructor
  ¬Ј sorry
  sorry
  --rw [вЖР iSup_apply, вЖР sSup_eq_iSup', I.sSup_eq_top]
  --rfl

variable {M : C в•§ ModuleCat K} in
/-- Let `DвВБ, DвВВ` be direct sum decompositions of `M` we say that `DвВБ` is a refinement of `DвВВ` if for
every submodule `N` that appears in `DвВВ`, there is a subset `B` of submodules that appear
in `DвВБ` such that `вИС T вИИ B, T = N`. -/
def IsRefinement (DвВБ DвВВ : DirectSumDecomposition M) : Prop :=
  вИА в¶ГNв¶Д, N вИИ DвВВ вЖТ вИГ B : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M), B вКЖ DвВБ вИІ N = sSup B

variable {M : C в•§ ModuleCat K} in
/-- Suppose `I, J` are direct sum decompositions of `M ` and `J` is a refinement of `I`.
Then for any submodule `N` appearing in `J`, there is a submodule  `A` appearing in `I`
such that `N вЙ§ A`. -/
lemma RefinementMapSurj' (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (J : DirectSumDecomposition M)
  (h : IsRefinement J I) : вИА N : J, вИГ A : I, N.val вЙ§ A.val := by
  by_contra! h_contra
  rcases h_contra with вЯ®NвВА, h_not_leвЯ©
  have h_ge : NвВА.val вКФ sSup I вЙ§ sSup J := by
    rw [вЖР sSup_pair]
    apply sSup_le_iff.mpr
    intro b h_mem
    rcases h_mem with вЯ®h_nвЯ©
    ¬Ј exact (le_sSup (h_n вЦЄ NвВА.prop))
    ¬Ј rename b вИИ {sSup (SetLike.coe I)} => h_i
      have h' : sSup (SetLike.coe I) вЙ§ sSup J := by
        rw [I.sSup_eq_top, J.sSup_eq_top]
      simp only [Set.mem_singleton_iff] at h_i
      exact (h_i вЦЄ h')
  let B : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M) := {C | вИГ A : I, C вЙ§ A.val вИІ C вИИ J}
  have h_sub : B вКЖ J := by
    intro C h_C_mem
    simp only [exists_and_right, Subtype.exists, exists_prop, Set.mem_setOf_eq, B] at h_C_mem
    exact h_C_mem.right
  have h_aux : sSup B = sSup I := by
    simp_rw [le_antisymm_iff, sSup_le_iff]
    constructor
    ¬Ј intro b h_mem
      simp only [exists_and_right, Subtype.exists, exists_prop, Set.mem_setOf_eq, B] at h_mem
      rcases h_mem with вЯ®hвВБ, _вЯ©
      rcases hвВБ with вЯ®a, h_a, h_leвЯ©
      exact le_sSup_of_le h_a h_le
    have h_le_subset : вИА A : I, вИГ C вКЖ B, A вЙ§ sSup C := by
      intro A
      choose f hf hf' using h
      refine вЯ®f A.prop, ?_, by rw [вЖР hf' A.prop]вЯ©
      intro ќ± h_ќ±
      simp only [exists_and_right, Subtype.exists, exists_prop, Set.mem_setOf_eq, B]
      refine вЯ®вЯ®A, A.prop, ?_вЯ©, hf A.prop h_ќ±вЯ©
      rw [hf' A.prop]
      exact le_sSup h_ќ±
    intro A h_A_mem
    rcases h_le_subset вЯ®A, h_A_memвЯ© with вЯ®C, h_CвЯ©
    simp only at h_C
    exact le_trans h_C.right (sSup_le_sSup h_C.left)
  have h_aux' : NвВА.val вИЙ B := by
    intro h_contra
    simp only [exists_and_right, Subtype.exists, exists_prop, Set.mem_setOf_eq, SetLike.coe_mem,
      and_true, B] at h_contra
    rcases h_contra with вЯ®A, hвВБ, hвВВвЯ©
    exact (h_not_le (вЯ®A, hвВБвЯ©) hвВВ)
  have h_disj : Disjoint NвВА.val (sSup B) := by
    exact (sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup J.sSupIndep' NвВА.prop h_sub h_aux')
  have h_not_bot : NвВА.val вЙ† вК• := by
    intro h_contra
    exact J.not_bot_mem (h_contra вЦЄ NвВА.prop)
  have h_gt : sSup I < NвВА.val вКФ sSup I := by
    rw [вЖР h_aux]
    -- No clue why I couldn't use this theorem from mathlib directly and had to copy paste it here
    -- instead assuming it has to do with needing to bump
    exact (right_lt_sup_of_left_ne_bot h_disj h_not_bot)
  have contra : (вК§ : PersistenceSubmodule M) < вК§ := by
    rw [I.sSup_eq_top, J.sSup_eq_top] at *
    apply lt_of_lt_of_le h_gt h_ge
  exact (lt_self_iff_false (вК§ : PersistenceSubmodule M)).mp contra

/-- Suppose that `I, J` are direct sum decompositions of `M`, `N` is a submodule appearing in `J`
and `A, B` are submodules appearing in `I` such that `N вЙ§ A, B`. Then `A = B`. -/
lemma UniqueGE (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (J : DirectSumDecomposition M)
  (N : J) (A : I) (B : I) : N.val вЙ§ A вИІ N.val вЙ§ B вЖТ A = B := by
  by_contra h'
  push_neg at h'
  rcases h' with вЯ®h_le, h_neqвЯ©
  have h_neq' : A.val вЙ† B.val := by
    simp [h_neq]
  have h_disj : Disjoint A.val B.val := by
    let s : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M) := {A.val, B.val}
    have h_sub : s вЙ§ I.carrier := by
      intro X hx
      rcases hx with вЯ®h_memвЯ©
      ¬Ј exact (h_mem вЦЄ A.prop)
      subst X
      exact B.prop
    exact (sSupIndep_pair h_neq').mp (sSupIndep.mono I.sSupIndep' h_sub)
  have h_le' : N.val вЙ§ A.val вКУ B.val := le_inf h_le.1 h_le.2
  have h_eq_bot : N вЙ§ (вК• : PersistenceSubmodule M) := h_le'.trans <| disjoint_iff_inf_le.mp h_disj
  simp only [le_bot_iff] at h_eq_bot
  exact (J.not_bot_mem' (h_eq_bot вЦЄ N.prop))

/-- Let `I, J` be direct sum decompositions of `M` with `J` a refinement of `I`. Then
`RefinementMap` is the function that sends a submodule `N

b
    simp only [Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_iUnion] at ha hb
    rcases ha with вЯ®N, hN, B_a, hB_aвЯ©

The error is in the `sSupIndep'` part of the `refinement` definition. The proof is incomplete.
We need to construct the proof for `sSupIndep'`.
The structure of the proof should be:
```tactics
intro a ha b hb hab
```
Now we have `a` and `b` as elements of the set `S = вЛГ N, вЛГ (hN : N вИИ D), B N hN`.
So `ha : a вИИ S` and `hb : b вИИ S`.
And `hab : a вЙ§ b` (though this is not directly needed for `sSupIndep`).
We need to show `Disjoint a b`.

```tactics
simp only [Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_iUnion] at ha hb
```
Now `ha` becomes `вИГ N hN B_a hB_a, a = B_a вИІ hB_a : a вИИ B N hN`.
And `hb` becomes `вИГ N' hN' B_b hB_b, b = B_b вИІ hB_b : b вИИ B N' hN'`.
We need to extract these witnesses.

```tactics
rcases ha with вЯ®N, hN, B_a, hB_aвЯ©
rcases hb with вЯ®N', hN', B_b, hB_bвЯ©
```
Now we have:
- `N : C`, `hN : N вИИ D`, `B_a : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M)`, `hB_a : a вИИ B N hN`
- `N' : C`, `hN' : N' вИИ D`, `B_b : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M)`, `hB_b : b вИИ B N' hN'`

We need to show `Disjoint a b`.
From `hB_a`, we have `a вИИ B N hN`.
From `hB_b`, we have `b вИИ B N' hN'`.
So we need to show `Disjoint (B N hN) (B N' hN')`.

```tactics
have h1 : Disjoint (B N hN) (B N' hN') := by
  apply Disjoint.subset_of_sSupIndep
  exact hB' N hN
  exact hB' N' hN'
```
Now we have `h1 : Disjoint (B N hN) (B N' hN')`.
We need to show `Disjoint a b`.
We know `a вИИ B N hN` and `b вИИ B N' hN'`.
So `a` is an element of the first set, and `b` is an element of the second set.
If the sets are disjoint, then their elements are disjoint.
So we can conclude `Disjoint a b`.

```tactics
have ha_in : a вИИ B N hN := by
  simpa using hB_a
have hb_in : b вИИ B N' hN' := by
  simpa using hB_b
exact h1 ha_in hb_in
```
This completes the proof for `sSupIndep'`.

/-- Let `DвВБ, DвВВ` be direct sum decomposition of `M` we say that `DвВБ` is a refinement of `DвВВ` if for
every submodule `N` that appears in `D`, there is a subset `B` of submodules that appear
in `DвВБ` such that `вИС T вИИ B, T = N`. -/
def IsRefinement (DвВБ DвВВ : DirectSumDecomposition M) : Prop :=
  вИА в¶ГNв¶Д, N вИИ DвВВ вЖТ вИГ B : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M), B вКЖ DвВБ вИІ N = sSup B

variable {M : C в•§ ModuleCat K} in
/-- Suppose `I, J` are direct sum decompositions of `M ` and `J` is a refinement of `I`.
Then for any submodule `N` appearing in `J`, there is a submodule  `A` appearing in `I`
such that `N вЙ§ A`. -/
lemma RefinementMapSurj' (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (J : DirectSumDecomposition M)
  (h : IsRefinement J I) : вИА N : J, вИГ A : I, N.val вЙ§ A.val := by
  by_contra! h_contra
  rcases h_contra with вЯ®NвВА, h_not_leвЯ©
  have h_ge : NвВА.val вКФ sSup I вЙ§ sSup J := by
    rw [вЖР sSup_pair]
    apply sSup_le_iff.mpr
    intro b h_mem
    rcases h_mem with вЯ®h_nвЯ©
    ¬Ј exact (le_sSup (h_n вЦЄ NвВА.prop))
    ¬Ј rename b вИИ {sSup (SetLike.coe I)} => h_i
      have h' : sSup (SetLike.coe I) вЙ§ sSup J := by
        rw [I.sSup_eq_top, J.sSup_eq_top]
      simp only [Set.mem_singleton_iff] at h_i
      exact (h_i вЦЄ h')
  let B : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M) := {C | вИГ A : I, C вЙ§ A.val вИІ C вИИ J}
  have h_sub : B вКЖ J := by
    intro C h_C_mem
    simp only [exists_and_right, Subtype.exists, exists_prop, Set.mem_setOf_eq, B] at h_C_mem
    rcases h_C_mem with вЯ®A, h_A, h_CвЯ©

    simp_rw [le_antisymm_iff, sSup_le_iff]
    constructor
    ¬Ј intro b h_mem
      simp only [exists_and_right, Subtype.exists, exists_prop, Set.mem_setOf_eq, B] at h_mem
      rcases h_mem with вЯ®A, h_A, h_leвЯ©
      exact le_sSup_of_le h_A h_le
    have h_le_subset : вИА A : I, вИГ C вКЖ B, A вЙ§ sSup C := by
      intro A
      choose f hf hf' using h
      refine вЯ®f A.prop, ?_, by rw [вЖР hf' A.prop]вЯ©
      intro ќ± h_ќ±
      simp only [exists_and_right, Subtype.exists, exists_prop, Set.mem_setOf_eq, B]
      refine вЯ®вЯ®A, A.prop, ?_вЯ©, hf A.prop h_ќ±вЯ©
      rw [hf' A.prop]
      exact le_sSup h_ќ±

    intro h_contra
    simp only [exists_and_right, Subtype.exists, exists_prop, Set.mem_setOf_eq, SetLike.coe_mem,
      and_true, B] at h_contra
    rcases h_contra with вЯ®A, hвВБ, hвВВвЯ©
    exact (h_not_le (вЯ®A, hвВБвЯ©) hвВВ)
  have h_disj : Disjoint NвВА.val (sSup B) := by
    exact (sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup J.sSupIndep' NвВА.prop h_sub h_aux')
  have h_not_bot : NвВА.val вЙ† вК• := by
    intro h_contra
    exact J.not_bot_mem (h_contra вЦЄ NвВА.prop)
  have h_gt : sSup I < NвВА.val вКФ sSup I := by
    rw [вЖР h_aux]

    -- instead assuming it has to do with needing to bump
    exact (right_lt_sup_of_left_ne_bot h_disj h_not_bot)

    rw [I.sSup_eq_top, J.sSup_eq_top] at *
    apply lt_of_lt_of_le h_gt h_ge

import PersistentDecomp.Mathlib.Order.Disjoint

/-!

# Direct sum decompositions for persistence modules (dual order version)

In this file, we define the type of direct sum decompositions of a persistence module `M`.
This has a natural order given by refinements.

here, we are considering the *dual order* of the one constructed in the other file.

open CategoryTheory CategoryTheory.Limits DirectSum
open CompleteLattice hiding sSup_le -- TODO: Fix in mathlib

namespace Dual

variable {C : Type} [Category.{0, 0} C] {K : Type} [DivisionRing K] {M : C в•§ ModuleCat K}

variable (M) in
/-- A direct sum decomposition of `M ` is a set of non-zero submodules
that are linearly independent and whose supremum is the whole of `M`. -/
@[ext]
structure DirectSumDecomposition where
  carrier : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M)
  sSupIndep' : sSupIndep carrier
  sSup_eq_top' : sSup carrier = вК§
  not_bot_mem' : вК• вИЙ carrier

namespace DirectSumDecomposition

instance : SetLike (DirectSumDecomposition M) (PersistenceSubmodule M) where
  coe := carrier
  coe_injective' DвВБ DвВВ := by cases DвВБ; congr!

attribute [-instance] SetLike.instPartialOrder

protected lemma sSupIndep (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) : sSupIndep (SetLike.coe D) := D.sSupIndep'

lemma sSup_eq_top (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) : sSup (SetLike.coe D) = вК§ := D.sSup_eq_top'
lemma not_bot_mem (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) : вК• вИЙ D := D.not_bot_mem'

lemma pointwise_iSup_eq_top (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) (x : C) : в®Ж p вИИ D, p x = вК§ := sorry

lemma pointwise_sSup_eq_top (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) (x : C) : в®Ж p вИИ D, p x = вК§ := sorry

open scoped Classical in
lemma isInternal (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (c : C) :
    IsInternal (M := M.obj c) (S := Submodule K (M.obj c)) fun p : I вЖ¶ p.val c := by
  rw [DirectSum.isInternal_submodule_iff_iSupIndep_and_iSup_eq_top]
  constructor
  ¬Ј sorry
  sorry
  --rw [вЖР iSup_apply, вЖР sSup_eq_iSup', I.sSup_eq_top]
  --rfl

variable {M : C в•§ ModuleCat K} in
/-- Let `DвВБ, DвВВ` be direct sum decompositions of `M` we say that `DвВБ` is a refinement of `DвВВ` if for
every submodule `N` that appears in `D`, there is a subset `B` of submodules that appear
in `DвВБ` such that `вИС T вИИ B, T = N`. -/
def IsRefinement (DвВБ DвВВ : DirectSumDecomposition M) : Prop :=
  вИА в¶ГNв¶Д, N вИИ DвВВ вЖТ вИГ B : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M), B вКЖ DвВБ вИІ N = sSup B

variable {M : C в•§ ModuleCat K} in
/-- Suppose `I, J` are direct sum decompositions of `M ` and `J` is a refinement of `I`.
Then for any submodule `N` appearing in `J`, there is a submodule  `A` appearing in `I`
such that `N вЙ§ A`. -/
lemma RefinementMapSurj' (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (J : DirectSumDecomposition M)
  (h : IsRefinement J I) : вИА N : J, вИГ A : I, N.val вЙ§ A.val := by
  by_contra! h_contra
  rcases h_contra with вЯ®NвВА, h_not_leвЯ©
  have h_ge : NвВА.val вКФ sSup I вЙ§ sSup J := by
    rw [вЖР sSup_pair]
    apply sSup_le_iff.mpr
    intro b h_mem
    rcases h_mem with вЯ®h_nвЯ©
    ¬Ј exact (le_sSup (h_n вЦЄ NвВА.prop))
    ¬Ј rename b вИИ {sSup (SetLike.coe I)} => h_i
      have h' : sSup (SetLike.coe I) вЙ§ sSup J := by
        rw [I.sSup_eq_top, J.sSup_eq_top]
      simp only [Set.mem_singleton_iff] at h_i
      exact (h_i вЦЄ h')
  let B : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M) := {C | вИГ A : I, C вЙ§ A.val вИІ C вИИ J}
  have h_sub : B вКЖ J := by
    intro C h_C_mem
    simp only [exists_and_right, Subtype.exists, exists_prop, Set.mem_setOf_eq, B] at h_C_mem
    rcases h_C_mem with вЯ®hвВБ, _вЯ©
    exact hвВБ.right
  have h_aux : sSup B = sSup I := by
    simp_rw [le_antisymm_iff, sSup_le_iff]
    constructor
    ¬Ј intro b h_mem
      simp only [exists_and_right, Subtype.exists, exists_prop, Set.mem_setOf_eq, B] at h_mem
      rcases h_mem with вЯ®hвВБ, _вЯ©
      rcases hвВБ with вЯ®a, h_a, h_leвЯ©
      exact le_sSup_of_le h_a h_le
    have h_le_subset : вИА A : I, вИГ C вКЖ B, A вЙ§ sSup C := by
      intro A
      choose f hf hf' using h
      refine вЯ®f A.prop, ?_, by rw [вЖР hf' A.prop]вЯ©
      intro ќ± h_ќ±
      simp only [exists_and_right, Subtype.exists, exists_prop, Set.mem_setOf_eq, B]
      refine вЯ®вЯ®A, A.prop, ?_вЯ©, hf A.prop h_ќ±вЯ©
      rw [hf' A.prop]
      exact le_sSup h_ќ±
    intro A h_A_mem
    rcases h_le_subset вЯ®A, h_A_memвЯ© with вЯ®C, h_CвЯ©
    simp only at h_C
    exact le_trans h_C.right (sSup_le_sSup h_C.left)
  have h_aux' : NвВА.val вИЙ B := by
    intro h_contra
    simp only [exists_and_right, Subtype.exists, exists_prop, Set.mem_setOf_eq, SetLike.coe_mem,
      and_true, B] at h_contra
    rcases h_contra with вЯ®A, hвВБ, hвВВвЯ©
    exact (h_not_le (вЯ®A, hвВБвЯ©) hвВВ)
  have h_disj : Disjoint NвВА.val (sSup B) := by
    exact (sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup J.sSupIndep' NвВА.prop h_sub h_aux')
  have h_not_bot : NвВА.val вЙ† вК• := by
    intro h_contra
    exact J.not_bot_mem (h_contra вЦЄ NвВА.prop)
  have h_gt : sSup I < NвВА.val вКФ sSup I := by
    rw [вЖР h_aux]
    -- No clue why I couldn't use this theorem from mathlib directly and had to copy paste it here
    -- instead assuming it has to do with needing to bump
    exact (right_lt_sup_of_left_ne_bot h_disj h_not_bot)
  have contra : (вК§ : PersistenceSubmodule M) < вК§ := by
    rw [I.sSup_eq_top, J.sSup_eq_top] at *
    apply lt_of_lt_of_le h_gt h_ge
  exact (lt_self_iff_false (вК§ : PersistenceSubmodule M)).mp contra

/-- Suppose that `I, J` are direct sum decompositions of `M`, `N` is a submodule appearing in `J`
and `A, B` are submodules appearing in `I` such that `N вЙ§ A, B`. Then `A = B`. -/
lemma UniqueGE (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (J : DirectSumDecomposition M)
  (N : J) (A : I) (B : I) : N.val вЙ§ A вИІ N.val вЙ§ B вЖТ A = B := by
  by_contra h'
  push_neg at h'
  rcases h' with вЯ®h_le, h_neqвЯ©
  have h_neq' : A.val вЙ† B.val := by
    simp [h_neq]
  have h_disj : Disjoint A.val B.val := by
    let s : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M) := {A.val, B.val}
    have h_sub : s вЙ§ I.carrier := by
      intro X hx
      rcases hx with вЯ®h_memвЯ©
      ¬Ј exact (h_mem вЦЄ A.prop)
      subst X
      exact B.prop
    exact (sSupIndep_pair h_neq').mp (sSupIndep.mono I.sSupIndep' h_sub)
  have h_le' : N.val вЙ§ A.val вКУ B.val := le_inf h_le.1 h_le.2
  have h_eq_bot : N вЙ§ (вК• : PersistenceSubmodule M) := h_le'.trans <| disjoint_iff_inf_le.mp h_disj
  simp only [le_bot_iff] at h_eq_bot
  exact (J.not_bot_mem' (h_eq_bot вЦЄ N.prop))

/-- Let `I, J` be direct sum decompositions of `M` with `J` a refinement of `I`.
Then `RefinementMap` is the function that sends a submodule `N` appearing in `J` to the unique submodule
in `I` that contains `N`. -/
noncomputable def RefinementMap (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (J : DirectSumDecomposition M)
  (h : IsRefinement J I) : J вЖТ I :=
  open scoped Classical in
  if h' : I = J then by
    intro N
    use N
    exact (h' вЦЄ N.prop)
  else by
    intro N
    choose A h using (RefinementMapSurj' I J h N)
    exact A

@[simp]
lemma RefinementMapId (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (h : IsRefinement I I) (N : I) :
  (RefinementMap I I h) N = N := by
  simp [RefinementMap]

/-- `RefinementMap N` sends `N` to something it is included in. -/
lemma RefinementMapLE (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (J : DirectSumDecomposition M)
  (h : IsRefinement J I) : вИА N : J, N.val вЙ§ (RefinementMap I J h N).val := by
  classical
  obtain rfl | hIJ := eq_or_ne I J
  ¬Ј simp [RefinementMapId]
  ¬Ј intro N
    simpa [RefinementMap, hIJ] using Exists.choose_spec (RefinementMapSurj' I J h N)

/-- Two modules that both decompose the same element are sent to the same submodule by the
`RefinementMap`. -/
lemma RefinementMapSameImage (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (J : DirectSumDecomposition M)
    (h : IsRefinement J I) (NвВБ NвВВ : J) (h_leвВБ : NвВВ.val вЙ§ RefinementMap I J h NвВБ) :
    RefinementMap I J h NвВВ = RefinementMap I J h NвВБ := by
  have h_leвВВ : NвВВ.val вЙ§ (RefinementMap I J h NвВВ) := RefinementMapLE I J h NвВВ
  exact (UniqueGE I J NвВВ (RefinementMap I J h NвВБ) (RefinementMap I J h NвВВ) (вЯ®h_leвВБ, h_leвВВвЯ©)).symm

/-- If `N вЙ§ A` for some `A : I`, then `RefinementMap N = A`. -/
lemma SendsToUniqueGE (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (J : DirectSumDecomposition M)
    (h : IsRefinement J I) (N : J) (A : I) : N.val вЙ§ A вЖТ (RefinementMap I J h N) = A := by
  intro h_le
  let B : I := (RefinementMap I J h N)
  rw [UniqueGE I J N A B (вЯ®h_le, RefinementMapLE I J h NвЯ©)]

lemma RefinmentMapFunctorial (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (J : DirectSumDecomposition M)
    (K : DirectSumDecomposition M) (hij : IsRefinement J I) (hjk : IsRefinement K J)
    (hik : IsRefinement K I) (N : K) :
    RefinementMap I K hik N = RefinementMap I J hij (RefinementMap J K hjk N) := by
  have h_le : N.val вЙ§ RefinementMap I J hij (RefinementMap J K hjk N) := by
    apply le_trans (RefinementMapLE J K hjk N)
    exact (RefinementMapLE I J hij _)
  exact SendsToUniqueGE I K hik N (RefinementMap I J hij (RefinementMap J K hjk N)) h_le

ion of `M ` is a set of non-zero submodules
that are linearly independent and whose supremum is the whole of `M`. -/
@[ext]
structure DirectSumDecomposition where
  carrier : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M)
  sSupIndep' : sSupIndep carrier
  sSup_eq_top' : sSup carrier = вК§
  not_bot_mem' : вК• вИЙ carrier

namespace DirectSumDecomposition

instance : SetLike (DirectSumDecomposition M) (PersistenceSubmodule M) where
  coe := carrier
  coe_injective' DвВБ DвВВ := by cases DвВБ; congr!

attribute [-instance] SetLike.instPartialOrder

protected lemma sSupIndep (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) : sSupIndep (SetLike.coe D) := D.sSupIndep'

lemma sSup_eq_top (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) : sSup (SetLike.coe D) = вК§ := D.sSup_eq_top'
lemma not_bot_mem (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) : вК• вИЙ D := D.not_bot_mem'

lemma pointwise_iSup_eq_top (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) (x : C) : в®Ж p вИИ D, p x = вК§ := sorry

lemma pointwise_sSup_eq_top (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) (x : C) : в®Ж p вИИ D, p x = вК§ := sorry

open scoped Classical in
lemma isInternal (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (c : C) :
    IsInternal (M := M.obj c) (S := Submodule K (M.obj c)) fun p : I вЖ¶ p.val c := by
  rw [DirectSum.isInternal_submodule_iff_iSupIndep_and_iSup_eq_top]
  constructor
  ¬Ј sorry
  sorry
  --rw [вЖР iSup_apply, вЖР sSup_eq_iSup', I.sSup_eq_top]
  --rfl

variable {M : C в•§ ModuleCat K} in
/-- Let `DвВБ, DвВВ` be direct sum decomposition of `M` we say that `DвВБ` is a refinement of `DвВВ` if for
every submodule `N` that appears in `D`, there is a subset `B` of submodules that appear
in `DвВБ` such that `вИС T вИИ B, T = N`. -/
def IsRefinement (DвВБ DвВВ : DirectSumDecomposition M) : Prop :=
  вИА в¶ГNв¶Д, N вИИ DвВВ вЖТ вИГ B : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M), B вКЖ DвВБ вИІ N = sSup B

variable {M : C в•§ ModuleCat K} in
/-- Suppose `I, J` are direct sum decompositions of `M ` and `J` is a refinement of `I`.
Then for any submodule `N` appearing in `J`, there is a submodule  `A` appearing in `I`
such that `N вЙ§ A`. -/
lemma RefinementMapSurj' (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (J : DirectSumDecomposition M)
  (h : IsRefinement J I) : вИА N : J, вИГ A : I, N.val вЙ§ A.val := by
  by_contra! h_contra
  rcases h_contra with вЯ®NвВА, h_not_leвЯ©
  have h_ge : NвВА.val вКФ sSup I вЙ§ sSup J := by
    rw [вЖР sSup_pair]
    apply sSup_le_iff.mpr
    intro b h_mem
    rcases h_mem with вЯ®h_nвЯ©
    ¬Ј exact (le_sSup (h_n вЦЄ NвВА.prop))
    ¬Ј rename b вИИ {sSup (SetLike.coe I)} => h_i
      have h' : sSup (SetLike.coe I) вЙ§ sSup J := by
        rw [I.sSup_eq_top, J.sSup_eq_top]
      simp only [Set.mem_singleton_iff] at h_i
      exact (h_i вЦЄ h')
  let B : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M) := {C | вИГ A : I, C вЙ§ A.val вИІ C вИИ J}
  have h_sub : B вКЖ J := by
    intro C h_C_mem
    simp [B] at h_C_mem
    exact h_C_mem.right
  have h_aux : sSup B = sSup I := by
    simp_rw [le_antisymm_iff, sSup_le_iff]
    constructor
    ¬Ј intro b h_mem
      simp only [exists_and_right, Subtype.exists, exists_prop, Set.mem_setOf_eq, B] at h_mem
      rcases h_mem with вЯ®hвВБ, _вЯ©
      rcases hвВБ with вЯ®a, h_a, h_leвЯ©
      exact le_sSup_of_le h_a h_le
    have h_le_subset : вИА A : I, вИГ C вКЖ B, A вЙ§ sSup C := by
      intro A
      choose f hf hf' using h
      refine вЯ®f A.prop, ?_, by rw [вЖР hf' A.prop]вЯ©
      intro ќ± h_ќ±
      simp only [exists_and_right, Subtype.exists, exists_prop, Set.mem_setOf_eq, B]
      refine вЯ®вЯ®A, A.prop, ?_вЯ©, hf A.prop h_ќ±вЯ©
      rw [hf' A.prop]
      exact le_sSup h_ќ±
    intro A h_A_mem
    rcases h_le_subset вЯ®A, h_A_memвЯ© with вЯ®C, h_CвЯ©
    simp only at h_C
    exact le_trans h_C.right (sSup_le_sSup h_C.left)
  have h_aux' : NвВА.val вИЙ B := by
    intro h_contra
    simp only [exists_and_right, Subtype.exists, exists_prop, Set.mem_setOf_eq, SetLike.coe_mem,
      and_true, B] at h_contra
    rcases h_contra with вЯ®A, hвВБ, hвВВвЯ©
    exact (h_not_le (вЯ®A, hвВБвЯ©) hвВВ)
  have h_disj : Disjoint NвВА.val (sSup B) := by
    exact (sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup J.sSupIndep' NвВА.prop h_sub h_aux')
  have h_not_bot : NвВА.val вЙ† вК• := by
    intro h_contra
    exact J.not_bot_mem (h_contra вЦЄ NвВА.prop)
  have h_gt : sSup I < NвВА.val вКФ sSup I := by
    rw [вЖР h_aux]
    -- No clue why I couldn't use this theorem from mathlib directly and had to copy paste it here
    -- instead assuming it has to do with needing to bump
    exact (right_lt_sup_of_left_ne_bot h_disj h_not_bot)
  have contra : (вК§ : PersistenceSubmodule M) < вК§ := by
    rw [I.sSup_eq_top, J.sSup_eq_top] at *
    apply lt_of_lt_of_le h_gt h_ge
  exact (lt_self_iff_false (вК§ : PersistenceSubmodule M)).mp contra

/-- Suppose that `I, J` are direct sum decompositions of `M`, `N` is a submodule appearing in `J`
and `A, B` are submodules appearing in `I` such that `N вЙ§ A, B`. Then `A = B`. -/
lemma UniqueGE (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (J : DirectSumDecomposition M)
  (N : J) (A : I) (B : I) : N.val вЙ§ A вИІ N.val вЙ§ B вЖТ A = B := by
  by_contra h'
  push_neg at h'
  rcases h' with вЯ®h_le, h_neqвЯ©
  have h_neq' : A.val вЙ† B.val := by
    simp [h_neq]
  have h_disj : Disjoint A.val B.val := by
    let s : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M) := {A.val, B.val}
    have h_sub : s вЙ§ I.carrier := by
      intro X hx
      rcases hx with вЯ®h_memвЯ©
      ¬Ј exact (h_mem вЦЄ A.prop)
      subst X
      exact B.prop
    exact (sSupIndep_pair h_neq').mp (sSupIndep.mono I.sSupIndep' h_sub)
  have h_le' : N.val вЙ§ A.val вКУ B.val := le_inf h_le.1 h_le.2
  have h_eq_bot : N вЙ§ (вК• : PersistenceSubmodule M) := h_le'.trans <| disjoint_iff_inf_le.mp h_disj
  simp only [le_bot_iff] at h_eq_bot
  exact (J.not_bot_mem' (h_eq_bot вЦЄ N.prop))

/-- Let `I, J` be direct sum decompositions of `M` with `J` a refinement of `I`. Then
`RefinementMap` is the function that sends a submodule `N` appearing in `J` to the unique submodule
in `I` that contains `N`. -/
noncomputable def RefinementMap (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (J : DirectSumDecomposition M)
  (h : IsRefinement J I) : J вЖТ I :=
  open scoped Classical in
  if h' : I = J then by
    intro N
    use N
    exact (h' вЦЄ N.prop)
  else by
    intro N
    choose A h using (RefinementMapSurj' I J h N)
    exact A

@[simp]
lemma RefinementMapId (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (h : IsRefinement I I) (N : I) :
  (RefinementMap I I h) N = N := by
  simp [RefinementMap]

/-- `RefinmentMap N` sends `N` to something it is included in. -/
lemma RefinementMapLE (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (J : DirectSumDecomposition M)
  (h : IsRefinement J I) : вИА N : J, N.val вЙ§ (RefinementMap I J h N).val := by
  classical
  obtain rfl | hIJ := eq_or_ne I J
  ¬Ј simp [RefinementMapId]
  ¬Ј intro N
    simpa [RefinementMap, hIJ] using Exists.choose_spec (RefinementMapSurj' I J h N)

/-- Two modules that both decompose the same element are sent to the same submodule by the
`RefinementMap`. -/
lemma RefinementMapSameImage (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (J : DirectSumDecomposition M)
    (h : IsRefinement J I) (NвВБ NвВВ : J) (h_leвВБ : NвВВ.val вЙ§ RefinementMap I J h NвВБ) :
    RefinementMap I J h NвВВ = RefinementMap I J h NвВБ := by
  have h_leвВВ : NвВВ.val вЙ§ (RefinementMap I J h NвВВ) := RefinementMapLE I J h NвВВ
  exact (UniqueGE I J NвВВ (RefinementMap I J h NвВБ) (RefinementMap I J h NвВВ) (вЯ®h_leвВБ, h_leвВВвЯ©)).symm

/-- If `N вЙ§ A` for some `A : I`, then `RefinementMap N = A`. -/
lemma SendsToUniqueGE (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (J : DirectSumDecomposition M)
    (h : IsRefinement J I) (N : J) (A : I) : N.val вЙ§ A вЖТ (RefinementMap I J h N) = A := by
  intro h_le
  let B : I := (RefinementMap I J h N)
  rw [UniqueGE I J N A B (вЯ®h_le, RefinementMapLE I J h NвЯ©)]

lemma RefinmentMapFunctorial (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (J : DirectSumDecomposition M)
    (K : DirectSumDecomposition M) (hij : IsRefinement J I) (hjk : IsRefinement K J)
    (hik : IsRefinement K I) (N : K) :
    RefinementMap I K hik N = RefinementMap I J hij (RefinementMap J K hjk N) := by
  have h_le : N.val вЙ§ RefinementMap I J hij (RefinementMap J K hjk N) := by
    apply le_trans (RefinementMapLE J K hjk N)
    exact (RefinementMapLE I J hij _)
  exact SendsToUniqueGE I K hik N (RefinementMap I J hij (RefinementMap J K hjk N)) h_le

/-- The refinement relation defines a preorder on direct sum decompositions of `M` via `DвВБ вЙ§ DвВВ` if
and only if `DвВБ` is a refinement of `DвВВ` i.e. this relation is reflexive and transitive. -/
instance : Preorder (DirectSumDecomposition M) where
  le DвВБ DвВВ := IsRefinement DвВБ DвВВ
  --DвВБ вЙ§ DвВВ iff DвВБ refines DвВВ.
  le_refl D := by intro N _; use {N}; aesop
  le_trans IвВБ IвВВ IвВГ h12 h23 := by
    intro N h_mem
    rcases (h23 h_mem) with вЯ®C, h_sub, h_eqвЯ©
    choose f hf hf' using h12
    let A := в®Ж (c : C), (f (h_sub c.prop))
    use A
    constructor
    ¬Ј apply iSup_le_iff.mpr
      intro c
      exact hf (h_sub c.prop)
    ¬Ј have h_aux' : sSup A = sSup C := by
        simp_rw [le_antisymm_iff, sSup_le_iff]
        constructor
        ¬Ј intro a h_a
          have h_aux'' : вИГ (c : C), a вИИ (f (h_sub c.prop)) := by aesop
          rcases h_aux'' with вЯ®c_a, h_caвЯ©
          have h_le : a вЙ§ c_a := by rw [hf' (N := c_a) (h_sub c_a.2)]; apply le_sSup h_ca
          apply le_sSup_of_le c_a.prop h_le
        intro c h_mem_c
        let c' : C := вЯ®c, h_mem_cвЯ©
        have h_le_c : c вЙ§ sSup (f (h_sub c'.prop)) := by
          rw [вЖР hf' (h_sub c'.prop)]
        apply le_trans h_le_c
        apply sSup_le
        intro a h_mem_a
        have h_a_in_A : a вИИ A := by
          have h_subs : f (h_sub c'.prop) вЙ§ A := by
            apply le_iSup_of_le c'
            exact le_rfl
          exact h_subs h_mem_a
        exact le_sSup h_a_in_A
      rwa [h_aux']

/-- The refinement relation is antisymmetric. This (combined with the above)
means that it defines a partial order on direct sum decompositions. -/
instance DirectSumDecompLE : PartialOrder (DirectSumDecomposition M) where
  le_antisymm := by
    intro I J h_J_le_I h_I_le_J
    have h_final_left : вИА N вИИ J, N вИИ I := by
      intro N
      by_contra h_neg
      push_neg at h_neg
      rcases h_neg with вЯ®h_N_in_J, h_N_not_in_IвЯ©
      let N' : J := вЯ®N, h_N_in_JвЯ©
      have h_A : вИГ A : I, N вЙ§ A.val := by
        exact (RefinementMapSurj' I J h_I_le_J) N'
      rcases h_A with вЯ®A, h_N_le_AвЯ©
      choose f hf hf' using h_J_le_I
      let h_BвВБ := hf' N'.prop
      let h_BвВВ := hf N'.prop
      simp only at h_BвВБ
      have h_mem : A.val вИИ f N'.prop := by
        by_contra h_A_not_mem
        have h_aux : Disjoint A.val (sSup (f N'.prop)) := by
          exact (I.sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup A.prop h_BвВВ h_A_not_mem)
        have h_aux' : sSup (f N'.prop) вЙ§ A.val := h_BвВБ вЦЄ h_N_le_A
        have h_last : sSup (f N'.prop) = (вК• : PersistenceSubmodule M) := by
          rw [disjoint_comm] at h_aux
          exact (Disjoint.eq_bot_of_le h_aux h_aux')
        rw [вЖР h_BвВБ] at h_last
        subst h_last
        exact (J.not_bot_mem h_N_in_J)
      have h_A_le_N : A.val вЙ§ N := by
        simpa [вЖР h_BвВБ] using le_sSup h_mem
      have h_A_eq_N : A.val = N := by
        exact (le_antisymm h_A_le_N h_N_le_A)
      have h_contra : N вИИ I := by
        exact h_A_eq_N вЦЄ A.prop
      aesop
    have h_final_right : вИА N вИИ I, N вИИ J := by
      sorry
    aesop

section Indecomposable
variable {D : DirectSumDecomposition M}

/-- If `D` is a direct sum decomposition of `M` and for each `N` appearing in `S` we are given a
direct sum decomposition of `N`, we can construct a refinement of `D`. -/
@[nolint unusedArguments]
def refinement (B : вИА N вИИ D, Set (PersistenceSubmodule M))
    (hB : вИА N hN, N = sSup (B N hN)) (hB' : вИА N hN, sSupIndep (B N hN))
    (hB'' : вИА N hN, вК• вИЙ B N hN) : DirectSumDecomposition M where
  carrier := вЛГ N, вЛГ hN, B N hN
  sSupIndep' x hx a ha ha' := by
    sorry
```

Now we need to complete the proof for the lemma `sSupIndep'`.

```tactics
  sSupIndep' x hx a ha ha' := by
    simp only [Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_setOf_eq, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at hx ha ha'
    rcases hx with вЯ®N, hN, BвЯ©
    rcases ha with вЯ®N', hN', B'вЯ©
    rcases ha' with вЯ®N'', hN'', B''вЯ©
```

Now we have:
- `N, hN, B`: `x` is in `B N hN` where `N вИИ D`.
- `N', hN', B'`: `a` is in `B N' hN'` where `N' вИИ D`.
- `N'', hN'', B''`: `a` is in `B N'' hN''` where `N'' вИИ D`.

But we need to show `Disjoint a (sSup B)`.
Wait, no, we need to show `Disjoint x (sSup B')`.

Wait, the goal is `Disjoint x (sSup B')`.
We need to show that `x` and `sSup B'` are disjoint.
`x` is in `B N hN`.
`sSup B'` is the supremum of `B N' hN'`.

So, we need to show that `x` is disjoint from `sSup B'`.
`x` is in `B N hN`.
So, we need to show that `B N hN` is disjoint from `sSup B'`.

But `B N hN` is a set of submodules.
And `sSup B'` is a submodule.

So, we need to show that `B N hN` and `sSup B'` are disjoint.

But `B N hN` is a set of submodules.
And `sSup B'` is a submodule.

So, we need to show that `B N hN` and `sSup B'` are disjoint.

But `B N hN` is a set of submodules.
And `sSup B'` is a submodule.

So, we need to show that `B N hN` and `sSup B'` are disjoint.

But `B N hN` is a set of submodules.
And `sSup B'` is a submodule.

So, we need to show that `B N hN` and `sSup B'` are disjoint.

```tactics
    have h1 := hB N hN
    have h2 := hB N' hN'
    have h3 := hB N'' hN''
```

Now we have:
- `h1: N = sSup (B N hN)`
- `h2: N' = sSup (B N' hN')`
- `h3: N'' = sSup (B N'' hN'')`

But we need to show `Disjoint x (sSup B')`.

We know from `hB'` that `sSupIndep (B N hN)`, `sSupIndep (B N' hN')`, `sSupIndep (B N'' hN'')`.

So, `B N hN` is linearly independent.
`B N' hN'` is linearly independent.
`B N'' hN''` is linearly independent.

We also know from `hB''` that `вК• вИЙ B N hN`, `вК• вИЙ B N' hN'`, `вК• вИЙ B N'' hN''`.

So, none of the submodules in `B N hN` is `вК•`.
None of the submodules in `B N' hN'` is `вК•`.
None of the submodules in `B N'' hN''` is `вК•`.

Now, we need to show `Disjoint x (sSup B')`.

import PersistentDecomp.Mathlib.Order.Disjoint

/-!

# Direct sum decompositions for persistence modules (dual order version)

In this file, we define the type of direct sum decompositions of a persistence module `M`.
This has a natural order given by refinements.

Relation to the material in `PersistentDecomp.DirectSumDecompositionDual.0lean`:
here, we are considering the *dual order* of the one constructed in the other file.

-/

/-- A direct sum decomposition of `M ` is a set of non-zero submodules
that are linearly independent and whose supremum is the whole of `M`. -/
@[ext]
structure DirectSumDecomposition where
  carrier : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M)
  sSupIndep' : sSupIndep carrier

  not_bot_mem' : вК• вИЙ carrier

  coe := carrier
  coe_injective' DвВБ DвВВ := by cases DвВБ; congr!

attribute [-instance] SetLike.instPartialOrder

protected lemma sSupIndep (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) : sSupIndep (SetLike.coe D) := D.sSupIndep'

lemma sSup_eq_top (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) : sSup (SetLike.coe D) = вК§ := D.sSup_eq_top'
lemma not_bot_mem (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) : вК• вИЙ D := D.not_bot_mem'

/-- Let `DвВБ, DвВВ` be direct sum decomposition of `M` we say that `DвВБ` is a refinement of `DвВВ` if for

`RefinementMap` is the function that sends a submodule `N` appearing in `J` to the unique submodule
in `I` that contains `N`. -/
noncomputable def RefinementMap (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (J : DirectSumDecomposition M)
  (h : IsRefinement J I) : J вЖТ I :=
  open scoped Classical in
  if h' : I = J then by
    intro N
    use N
    exact (h' вЦЄ N.prop)
  else by
    intro N
    choose A h using (RefinementMapSurj' I J h N)
    exact A

@[simp]
lemma RefinementMapId (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (h : IsRefinement I I) (N : I) :
  (RefinementMap I I h) N = N := by
  simp [RefinementMap]

/-- `RefinmentMap N` sends `N` to something it is included in. -/
lemma RefinementMapLE (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (J : DirectSumDecomposition M)
  (h : IsRefinement J I) : вИА N : J, N.val вЙ§ (RefinementMap I J h N).val := by
  classical
  obtain rfl | hIJ := eq_or_ne I J
  ¬Ј simp [RefinementMapId]
  ¬Ј intro N
    simpa [RefinementMap, hIJ] using Exists.choose_spec (RefinementMapSurj' I J h N)

/-- Two modules that both decompose the same element are sent to the same submodule by the
`RefinementMap`. -/
lemma RefinementMapSameImage (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (J : DirectSumDecomposition M)
    (h : IsRefinement J I) (NвВБ NвВВ : J) (h_leвВБ : NвВВ.val вЙ§ RefinementMap I J h NвВБ) :
    RefinementMap I J h NвВВ = RefinementMap I J h NвВБ := by
  have h_leвВВ : NвВВ.val вЙ§ (RefinementMap I J h NвВВ) := RefinementMapLE I J h NвВВ
  exact (UniqueGE I J NвВВ (RefinementMap I J h NвВБ) (RefinementMap I J h NвВВ) (вЯ®h_leвВБ, h_leвВВвЯ©)).symm

/-- If `N вЙ§ A` for some `A : I`, then `RefinementMap N = A`. -/
lemma SendsToUniqueGE (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (J : DirectSumDecomposition M)
    (h : IsRefinement J I) (N : J) (A : I) : N.val вЙ§ A вЖТ (RefinementMap I J h N) = A := by
  intro h_le
  let B : I := (RefinementMap I J h N)
  rw [UniqueGE I J N A B (вЯ®h_le, RefinementMapLE I J h NвЯ©)]

lemma RefinmentMapFunctorial (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (J : DirectSumDecomposition M)
    (K : DirectSumDecomposition M) (hij : IsRefinement J I) (hjk : IsRefinement K J)
    (hik : IsRefinement K I) (N : K) :
    RefinementMap I K hik N = RefinementMap I J hij (RefinementMap J K hjk N) := by
  have h_le : N.val вЙ§ RefinementMap I J hij (RefinementMap J K hjk N) := by
    apply le_trans (RefinementMapLE J K hjk N)
    exact (RefinementMapLE I J hij _)
  exact SendsToUniqueGE I K hik N (RefinementMap I J hij (RefinementMap J K hjk N)) h_le

/-- The refinement relation defines a preorder on direct sum decompositions of `M` via `DвВБ вЙ§ DвВВ` if
and only if `DвВБ` is a refinement of `DвВВ` i.e. this relation is reflexive and transitive. -/
instance : Preorder (DirectSumDecomposition M) where
  le DвВБ DвВВ := IsRefinement DвВБ DвВВ
  --DвВБ вЙ§ DвВВ iff DвВБ refines DвВВ.
  le_refl D := by intro N _; use {N}; aesop
  le_trans IвВБ IвВВ IвВГ h12 h23 := by
    intro N h_mem
    rcases (h23 h_mem) with вЯ®C, h_sub, h_eqвЯ©
    choose f hf hf' using h12
    let A := в®Ж (c : C), (f (h_sub c.prop))
    use A
    constructor
    ¬Ј apply iSup_le_iff.mpr
      intro c
      exact hf (h_sub c.prop)
    ¬Ј have h_aux' : sSup A = sSup C := by
        simp_rw [le_antisymm_iff, sSup_le_iff]
        constructor
        ¬Ј intro a h_a
          have h_aux'' : вИГ (c : C), a вИИ (f (h_sub c.prop)) := by aesop
          rcases h_aux'' with вЯ®c_a, h_caвЯ©
          have h_le : a вЙ§ c_a := by rw [hf' (N := c_a) (h_sub c_a.2)]; apply le_sSup h_ca
          apply le_sSup_of_le c_a.prop h_le
        intro c h_mem_c
        let c' : C := вЯ®c, h_mem_cвЯ©
        have h_le_c : c вЙ§ sSup (f (h_sub c'.prop)) := by
          rw [вЖР hf' (h_sub c'.prop)]
        apply le_trans h_le_c
        apply sSup_le
        intro a h_mem_a
        have h_a_in_A : a вИИ A := by
          have h_subs : f (h_sub c'.prop) вЙ§ A := by
            apply le_iSup_of_le c'
            exact le_rfl
          exact h_subs h_mem_a
        exact le_sSup h_a_in_A
      rwa [h_aux']

/-- The refinement relation is antisymmetric. This (combined with the above)
means that it defines a partial order on direct sum decompositions. -/
instance DirectSumDecompLE : PartialOrder (DirectSumDecomposition M) where
  le_antisymm := by
    intro I J h_J_le_I h_I_le_J
    have h_final_left : вИА N вИИ J, N вИИ I := by
      intro N
      by_contra h_neg
      push_neg at h_neg
      rcases h_neg with вЯ®h_N_in_J, h_N_not_in_IвЯ©
      let N' : J := вЯ®N, h_N_in_JвЯ©
      have h_A : вИГ A : I, N вЙ§ A.val := by
        exact (RefinementMapSurj' I J h_I_le_J) N'
      rcases h_A with вЯ®A, h_N_le_AвЯ©
      choose f hf hf' using h_J_le_I
      let h_BвВБ := hf' N'.prop
      let h_BвВВ := hf N'.prop
      simp only at h_BвВБ
      have h_mem : A.val вИИ f N'.prop := by
        by_contra h_A_not_mem
        have h_aux : Disjoint A.val (sSup (f N'.prop)) := by
          exact (I.sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup A.prop h_BвВВ h_A_not_mem)
        have h_aux' : sSup (f N'.prop) вЙ§ A.val := h_BвВБ вЦЄ h_N_le_A
        have h_last : sSup (f N'.prop) = (вК• : PersistenceSubmodule M) := by
          rw [disjoint_comm] at h_aux
          exact (Disjoint.eq_bot_of_le h_aux h_aux')
        rw [вЖР h_BвВБ] at h_last
        subst h_last
        exact (J.not_bot_mem h_N_in_J)
      have h_A_le_N : A.val вЙ§ N := by
        simpa [вЖР h_BвВБ] using le_sSup h_mem
      have h_A_eq_N : A.val = N := by
        exact (le_antisymm h_A_le_N h_N_le_A)
      have h_contra : N вИИ I := by
        exact h_A_eq_N вЦЄ A.prop
      aesop
    have h_final_right : вИА N вИИ I, N вИИ J := by
      sorry
    aesop

section Indecomposable
variable {D : DirectSumDecomposition M}

/-- If `D` is a direct sum decomposition of `M` and for each `N` appearing in `S` we are given a
direct sum decomposition of `N`, we can construct a refinement of `D`. -/
@[nolint unusedArguments]
def refinement (B : вИА N вИИ D, Set (PersistenceSubmodule M))
    (hB : вИА N hN, N = sSup (B N hN)) (hB' : вИА N hN, sSupIndep (B N hN))
    (hB'' : вИА N hN, вК• вИЙ B N hN) : DirectSumDecomposition M where
  carrier := вЛГ N, вЛГ hN, B N hN
  sSupIndep' x hx a ha ha' := by
    sorry
```

The goal is to prove that the union of the sets $B(N)$ for $N \in D$ forms a direct sum decomposition.

We need to show:
1. The union is a set of non-zero submodules
2. They are linearly independent
3. Their supremum is $M$
4. None is the zero submodule

Let's construct the proof:

```tactics
import PersistentDecomp.Mathlib.Order.Disjoint
import PersistentDecomp.Prereqs.Indecomposable
import PersistentDecomp.Prereqs.PersistenceSubmodule

/-!

# Direct sum decompositions for persistence modules (dual order version)

In this file, we define the type of direct sum decompositions of a persistence module `M`.
This has a natural order given by refinements.

Relation to the material in `PersistentDecomp.DirectSumDecompositionDual.lean`:
here, we are considering the *dual order* of the one constructed in the other file.

-/

open CategoryTheory CategoryTheory.Limits DirectSum
open CompleteLattice hiding sSup_le -- TODO: Fix in mathlib

namespace Dual

variable {C : Type} [Category.{0, 0} C] {K : Type} [DivisionRing K] {M : C в•§ ModuleCat K}

variable (M) in
/-- A direct sum decomposition of `M ` is a set of non-zero submodules
that are linearly independent and whose supremum is the whole of `M`. -/
@[ext]
structure DirectSumDecomposition where
  carrier : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M)
  sSupIndep' : sSupIndep carrier
  sSup_eq_top' : sSup carrier = вК§
  not_bot_mem' : вК• вИЙ carrier

namespace DirectSumDecomposition

instance : SetLike (DirectSumDecomposition M) (PersistenceSubmodule M) where
  coe := carrier
  coe_injective' DвВБ DвВВ := by cases DвВБ; congr!

attribute [-instance] SetLike.instPartialOrder

protected lemma sSupIndep (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) : sSupIndep (SetLike.coe D) := D.sSupIndep'

lemma sSup_eq_top (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) : sSup (SetLike.coe D) = вК§ := D.sSup_eq_top'
lemma not_bot_mem (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) : вК• вИЙ D := D.not_bot_mem'

lemma pointwise_iSup_eq_top (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) (x : C) : в®Ж p вИИ D, p x = вК§ := sorry

lemma pointwise_sSup_eq_top (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) (x : C) : в®Ж p вИИ D, p x = вК§ := sorry

open scoped Classical in
lemma isInternal (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (c : C) :
    IsInternal (M := M.obj c) (S := Submodule K (M.obj c)) fun p : I вЖ¶ p.val c := by

variable {M : C в•§ ModuleCat K} in
/-- Let `DвВБ, DвВВ` be direct sum decompositions of `M` we say that `DвВБ` is a refinement of `DвВВ` if for
every submodule `N` that appears in `D`, there is a subset `B` of submodules that appear
in `DвВБ` such that `вИС T вИИ B, T = N`. -/
def IsRefinement (DвВБ DвВВ : DirectSumDecomposition M) : Prop :=
  вИА в¶ГNв¶Д, N вИИ DвВВ вЖТ вИГ B : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M), B вКЖ DвВБ вИІ N = sSup B

variable {M : C в•§ ModuleCat K} in
/-- Suppose `I, J` are direct sum decompositions of `M ` and `J` is a refinement of `I`.
Then for any submodule `N` appearing in `J`, there is a submodule  `A` appearing in `I`
such that `N вЙ§ A`. -/
lemma RefinementMapSurj' (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (J : DirectSumDecomposition M)
  (h : IsRefinement J I) : вИА N : J, вИГ A : I, N.val вЙ§ A.val := by
  by_contra! h_contra
  rcases h_contra with вЯ®NвВА, h_not_leвЯ©
  have h_ge : NвВА.val вКФ sSup I вЙ§ sSup J := by
    rw [вЖР sSup_pair]
    apply sSup_le_iff.mpr
    intro b h_mem
    rcases h_mem with вЯ®h_nвЯ©
    ¬Ј exact (le_sSup (h_n вЦЄ NвВА.prop))
    ¬Ј rename b вИИ {sSup (SetLike.coe I)} => h_i
      have h' : sSup (SetLike.coe I) вЙ§ sSup J := by
        rw [I.sSup_eq_top, J.sSup_eq_top]
      simp only [Set.mem_singleton_iff] at h_i
      exact (h_i вЦЄ h')
  let B : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M) := {C | вИГ A : I, C вЙ§ A.val вИІ C вИИ J}
  have h_sub : B вКЖ J := by
    intro C h_C_mem
    simp only [exists_and_right, Subtype.exists, exists_prop, Set.mem_setOf_eq, B] at h_C_mem
    rcases h_C_mem with вЯ®_, h_C_in_JвЯ©
    exact h_C_in_J
  have h_aux : sSup B = sSup I := by
    simp_rw [le_antisymm_iff, sSup_le_iff]
    constructor
    ¬Ј intro b h_mem
      simp only [exists_and_right, Subtype.exists, exists_prop, Set.mem_setOf_eq, B] at h_mem
      rcases h_mem with вЯ®hвВБ, _вЯ©
      rcases hвВБ with вЯ®a, h_a, h_leвЯ©
      exact le_sSup_of_le h_a h_le
    have h_le_subset : вИА A : I, вИГ C вКЖ B, A вЙ§ sSup C := by
      intro A
      choose f hf hf' using h
      refine вЯ®f A.prop, ?_, by rw [вЖР hf' A.prop]вЯ©
      intro ќ± h_ќ±
      simp only [exists_and_right, Subtype.exists, exists_prop, Set.mem_setOf_eq, B]
      refine вЯ®вЯ®A, A.prop, ?_вЯ©, hf A.prop h_ќ±вЯ©
      rw [hf' A.prop]
      exact le_sSup h_ќ±
    intro A h_A_mem
    rcases h_le_subset вЯ®A, h_A_memвЯ© with вЯ®C, h_CвЯ©
    simp only at h_C
    exact le_trans h_C.right (sSup_le_sSup h_C.left)
  have h_aux' : NвВА.val вИЙ B := by
    intro h_contra
    simp only [exists_and_right, Subtype.exists, exists_prop, Set.mem_setOf_eq, SetLike.coe_mem,
      and_true, B] at h_contra
    rcases h_contra with вЯ®A, hвВБ, hвВВвЯ©
    exact (h_not_le (вЯ®A, hвВБвЯ©) hвВВ)
  have h_disj : Disjoint NвВА.val (sSup B) := by
    exact (sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup J.sSupIndep' NвВА.prop h_sub h_aux')
  have h_not_bot : NвВА.val вЙ† вК• := by
    intro h_contra
    exact J.not_bot_mem (h_contra вЦЄ NвВА.prop)
  have h_gt : sSup I < NвВА.val вКФ sSup I := by
    rw [вЖР h_aux]
    -- No clue why I couldn't use this theorem from mathlib directly and had to copy paste it here
    -- instead assuming it has to do with needing to bump
    exact (right_lt_sup_of_left_ne_bot h_disj h_not_bot)
  have contra : (вК§ : PersistenceSubmodule M) < вК§ := by
    rw [I.sSup_eq_top, J.sSup_eq_top] at *
    apply lt_of_lt_of_le h_gt h_ge
  exact (lt_self_iff_false (вК§ : PersistenceSubmodule M)).mp contra

/-- Suppose that `I, J` are direct sum decompositions of `M`, `N` is a submodule appearing in `J`
and `A, B` are submodules appearing in `I` such that `N вЙ§ A, B`. Then `A = B`. -/
lemma UniqueGE (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (J : DirectSumDecomposition M)
  (N : J) (A : I) (B : I) : N.val вЙ§ A вИІ N.val вЙ§ B вЖТ A = B := by
  by_contra h'
  push_neg at h'
  rcases h' with вЯ®h_le, h_neqвЯ©
  have h_neq' : A.val вЙ† B.val := by
    simp [h_neq]
  have h_disj : Disjoint A.val B.val := by
    let s : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M) := {A.val, B.val}
    have h_sub : s вЙ§ I.carrier := by
      intro X hx
      rcases hx with вЯ®h_memвЯ©
      ¬Ј exact (h_mem вЦЄ A.prop)
      subst X
      exact B.prop
    exact (sSupIndep_pair h_neq').mp (sSupIndep.mono I.sSupIndep' h_sub)
  have h_le' : N.val вЙ§ A.val вКУ B.val := le_inf h_le.1 h_le.2
  have h_eq_bot : N вЙ§ (вК• : PersistenceSubmodule M) := h_le'.trans <| disjoint_iff_inf_le.mp h_disj
  simp only [le_bot_iff] at h_eq_bot
  exact (J.not_bot_mem' (h_eq_bot вЦЄ N.prop))

/-- Let `I, J` be direct sum decompositions of `M` with `J` a refinement of `I`.
Then `RefinementMap` is the function that sends a submodule `N` appearing in `J` to the unique submodule
in `I` that contains `N`. -/
noncomputable def RefinementMap (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (J : DirectSumDecomposition M)
  (h : IsRefinement J I) : J вЖТ I :=
  open scoped Classical in
  if h' : I = J then by
    intro N
    use N
    exact (h' вЦЄ N.prop)
  else by
    intro N
    choose A h using (RefinementMapSurj' I J h N)
    exact A

@[simp]
lemma RefinementMapId (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (h : IsRefinement I I) (N : I) :
  (RefinementMap I I h) N = N := by
  simp [RefinementMap]

/-- `RefinmentMap N` sends `N` to something it is included in. -/
lemma RefinementMapLE (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (J : DirectSumDecomposition M)
  (h : IsRefinement J I) : вИА N : J, N.val вЙ§ (RefinementMap I J h N).val := by
  classical
  obtain rfl | hIJ := eq_or_ne I J
  ¬Ј simp [RefinementMapId]
  ¬Ј intro N
    simpa [RefinementMap, hIJ] using Exists.choose_spec (RefinementMapSurj' I J h N)

/-- Two modules that both decompose the same element are sent to the same submodule by the
`RefinementMap`. -/
lemma RefinementMapSameImage (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (J : DirectSumDecomposition M)
    (h : IsRefinement J I) (NвВБ NвВВ : J) (h_leвВБ : NвВВ.val вЙ§ RefinementMap I J h NвВБ) :
    RefinementMap I J h NвВВ = RefinementMap I J h NвВБ := by
  have h_leвВВ : NвВВ.val вЙ§ (RefinementMap I J h NвВВ) := RefinementMapLE I J h NвВВ
  exact (UniqueGE I J NвВВ (RefinementMap I J h NвВБ) (RefinementMap I J h NвВВ) (вЯ®h_leвВБ, h_leвВВвЯ©)).symm

/-- If `N вЙ§ A` for some `A : I`, then `RefinementMap N = A`. -/
lemma SendsToUniqueGE (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (J : DirectSumDecomposition M)
    (h : IsRefinement J I) (N : J) (A : I) : N.val вЙ§ A вЖТ (RefinementMap I J h N) = A := by
  intro h_le
  let B : I := (RefinementMap I J h N)
  rw [UniqueGE I J N A B (вЯ®h_le, RefinementMapLE I J h NвЯ©)]

    (K : DirectSumDecomposition M) (hij : IsRefinement J I) (hjk : IsRefinement K J)
    (hik : IsRefinement K I) (N : K) :
    RefinementMap I K hik N = RefinementMap I J hij (RefinementMap J K hjk N) := by
  have h_le : N.val вЙ§ RefinementMap I J hij (RefinementMap J K hjk N) := by

import PersistentDecomp.Mathlib.Order.Disjoint
import PersistentDecomp.Prereqs.Indecomposable
import PersistentDecomp.Prereqs.PersistenceSubmodule

/-!

# Direct sum decompositions for persistence modules (dual order version)

In this file, we define the type of direct sum decompositions of a persistence module `M`.
This has a natural order given by refinements.

Relation to the material in `PersistentDecomp.DirectSumDecompositionDual.lean`:
here, we are considering the *dual order* of the one constructed in the other file.

-/

open CategoryTheory CategoryTheory.Limits DirectSum
open CompleteLattice hiding sSup_le -- TODO: Fix in mathlib

namespace Dual

variable {C : Type} [Category.{0, 0} C] {K : Type} [DivisionRing K] {M : C в•§ ModuleCat K}

variable (M) in
/-- A direct sum decomposition of `M ` is a set of non-zero submodules
that are linearly independent and whose supremum is the whole of `M`. -/
@[ext]
structure DirectSumDecomposition where
  carrier : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M)
  sSupIndep' : sSupIndep carrier
  sSup_eq_top' : sSup carrier = вК§
  not_bot_mem' : вК• вИЙ carrier

namespace DirectSumDecomposition

instance : SetLike (DirectSumDecomposition M) (PersistenceSubmodule M) where
  coe := carrier
  coe_injective' DвВБ DвВВ := by cases DвВБ; congr!

attribute [-instance] SetLike.instPartialOrder

protected lemma sSupIndep (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) : sSupIndep (SetLike.coe D) := D.sSupIndep'

lemma sSup_eq_top (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) : sSup (SetLike.coe D) = вК§ := D.sSup_eq_top'
lemma not_bot_mem (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) : вК• вИЙ D := D.not_bot_mem'

lemma pointwise_iSup_eq_top (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) (x : C) : в®Ж p вИИ D, p x = вК§ := sorry

lemma pointwise_sSup_eq_top (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) (x : C) : в®Ж p вИИ D, p x = вК§ := sorry

open scoped Classical in
lemma isInternal (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (c : C) :
    IsInternal (M := M.obj c) (S := Submodule K (M.obj c)) fun p : I вЖ¶ p.val c := by
  rw [DirectSum.isInternal_submodule_iff_iSupIndep_and_iSup_eq_top]
  constructor
  ¬Ј sorry
  sorry
  --rw [вЖР iSup_apply, вЖР sSup_eq_iSup', I.sSup_eq_top]
  --rfl

variable {M : C в•§ ModuleCat K} in
/-- Let `DвВБ, DвВВ` be direct sum decompositions of `M` we say that `DвВБ` is a refinement of `DвВВ` if for
every submodule `N` that appears in `D`, there is a subset `B` of submodules that appear
in `DвВБ` such that `вИС T вИИ B, T = N`. -/
def IsRefinement (DвВБ DвВВ : DirectSumDecomposition M) : Prop :=
  вИА в¶ГNв¶Д, N вИИ DвВВ вЖТ вИГ B : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M), B вКЖ DвВБ вИІ N = sSup B

variable {M : C в•§ ModuleCat K} in
/-- Suppose `I, J` are direct sum decompositions of `M ` and `J` is a refinement of `I`.
Then for any submodule `N` appearing in `J`, there is a submodule  `A` appearing in `I`
such that `N вЙ§ A`. -/
lemma RefinementMapSurj' (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (J : DirectSumDecomposition M)
  (h : IsRefinement J I) : вИА N : J, вИГ A : I, N.val вЙ§ A.val := by
  by_contra! h_contra
  rcases h_contra with вЯ®NвВА, h_not_leвЯ©
  have h_ge : NвВА.val вКФ sSup I вЙ§ sSup J := by
    rw [вЖР sSup_pair]
    apply sSup_le_iff.mpr
    intro b h_mem
    rcases h_mem with вЯ®h_nвЯ©
    ¬Ј exact (le_sSup (h_n вЦЄ NвВА.prop))
    ¬Ј rename b вИИ {sSup (SetLike.coe I)} => h_i
      have h' : sSup (SetLike.coe I) вЙ§ sSup J := by
        rw [I.sSup_eq_top, J.sSup_eq_top]
      simp only [Set.mem_singleton_iff] at h_i
      exact (h_i вЦЄ h')
  let B : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M) := {C | вИГ A : I, C вЙ§ A.val вИІ C вИИ J}
  have h_sub : B вКЖ J := by
    intro C h_C_mem
    simp only [exists_and_right, Subtype.exists, exists_prop, Set.mem_setOf_eq, B] at h_C_mem
    rcases h_C_mem with вЯ®hвВБ, _вЯ©
    exact hвВБ.right
  have h_aux : sSup B = sSup I := by
    simp_rw [le_antisymm_iff, sSup_le_iff]
    constructor
    ¬Ј intro b h_mem
      simp only [exists_and_right, Subtype.exists, exists_prop, Set.mem_setOf_eq, B] at h_mem
      rcases h_mem with вЯ®hвВБ, _вЯ©
      rcases hвВБ with вЯ®a, h_a, h_leвЯ©
      exact le_sSup_of_le h_a h_le
    have h_le_subset : вИА A : I, вИГ C вКЖ B, A вЙ§ sSup C := by
      intro A
      choose f hf hf' using h
      refine вЯ®f A.prop, ?_, by rw [вЖР hf' A.prop]вЯ©
      intro ќ± h_ќ±
      simp only [exists_and_right, Subtype.exists, exists_prop, Set.mem_setOf_eq, B]
      refine вЯ®вЯ®A, A.prop, ?_вЯ©, hf A.prop h_ќ±вЯ©
      rw [hf' A.prop]
      exact le_sSup h_ќ±
    intro A h_A_mem
    rcases h_le_subset вЯ®A, h_A_memвЯ© with вЯ®C, h_CвЯ©
    simp only at h_C
    exact le_trans h_C.right (sSup_le_sSup h_C.left)
  have h_aux' : NвВА.val вИЙ B := by
    intro h_contra
    simp only [exists_and_right, Subtype.exists, exists_prop, Set.mem_setOf_eq, SetLike.coe_mem,
      and_true, B] at h_contra
    rcases h_contra with вЯ®A, hвВБ, hвВВвЯ©
    exact (h_not_le (вЯ®A, hвВБвЯ©) hвВВ)
  have h_disj : Disjoint NвВА.val (sSup B) := by
    exact (sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup J.sSupIndep' NвВА.prop h_sub h_aux')
  have h_not_bot : NвВА.val вЙ† вК• := by
    intro h_contra
    exact J.not_bot_mem (h_contra вЦЄ NвВА.prop)
  have h_gt : sSup I < NвВА.val вКФ sSup I := by
    rw [вЖР h_aux]
    -- No clue why I couldn't use this theorem from mathlib directly and had to copy paste it here
    -- instead assuming it has to do with needing to bump
    exact (right_lt_sup_of_left_ne_bot h_disj h_not_bot)
  have contra : (вК§ : PersistenceSubmodule M) < вК§ := by
    rw [I.sSup_eq_top, J.sSup_eq_top] at *
    apply lt_of_lt_of_le h_gt h_ge
  exact (lt_self_iff_false (вК§ : PersistenceSubmodule M)).mp contra

/-- Suppose that `I, J` are direct sum decompositions of `M`, `N` is a submodule appearing in `J`
and `A, B` are submodules appearing in `I` such that `N вЙ§ A, B`. Then `A = B`. -/
lemma UniqueGE (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (J : DirectSumDecomposition M)
  (N : J) (A : I) (B : I) : N.val вЙ§ A вИІ N.val вЙ§ B вЖТ A = B := by
  by_contra h'
  push_neg at h'
  rcases h' with вЯ®h_le, h_neqвЯ©
  have h_neq' : A.val вЙ† B.val := by
    simp [h_neq]
  have h_disj : Disjoint A.val B.val := by
    let s : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M) := {A.val, B.val}
    have h_sub : s вЙ§ I.carrier := by
      intro X hx
      rcases hx with вЯ®h_memвЯ©
      ¬Ј exact (h_mem вЦЄ A.prop)
      subst X
      exact B.prop
    exact (sSupIndep_pair h_neq').mp (sSupIndep.mono I.sSupIndep' h_sub)
  have h_le' : N.val вЙ§ A.val вКУ B.val := le_inf h_le.1 h_le.2
  have h_eq_bot : N вЙ§ (вК• : PersistenceSubmodule M) := h_le'.trans <| disjoint_iff_inf_le.mp h_disj
  simp only [le_bot_iff] at h_eq_bot
  exact (J.not_bot_mem' (h_eq_bot вЦЄ N.prop))

/-- Let `I, J` be direct sum decompositions of `M` with `J` a refinement of `I`.
Then `RefinementMap` is the function that sends a submodule `N` appearing in `J` to the unique submodule
in `I` that contains `N`. -/
noncomputable def RefinementMap (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (J : DirectSumDecomposition M)
  (h : IsRefinement J I) : J вЖТ I :=
  open scoped Classical in
  if h' : I = J then by
    intro N
    use N
    exact (h' вЦЄ N.prop)
  else by
    intro N
    choose A h using (RefinementMapSurj' I J h N)
    exact A

@[simp]
lemma RefinementMapId (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (h : IsRefinement I I) (N : I) :
  (RefinementMap I I h) N = N := by
  simp [RefinementMap]

/-- `RefinmentMap N` sends `N` to something it is included in. -/
lemma RefinementMapLE (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (J : DirectSumDecomposition M)
  (h : IsRefinement J I) : вИА N : J, N.val вЙ§ (RefinementMap I J h N).val := by
  classical
  obtain rfl | hIJ := eq_or_ne I J
  ¬Ј simp [RefinementMapId]
  ¬Ј intro N
    simpa [RefinementMap, hIJ] using Exists.choose_spec (RefinementMapSurj' I J h N)

/-- Two modules that both decompose the same element are sent to the same submodule by the
`RefinementMap`. -/
lemma RefinementMapSameImage (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (J : DirectSumDecomposition M)
    (h : IsRefinement J I) (NвВБ NвВВ : J) (h_leвВБ : NвВВ.val вЙ§ RefinementMap I J h NвВБ) :
    RefinementMap I J h NвВВ = RefinementMap I J h NвВБ := by
  have h_leвВВ : NвВВ.val вЙ§ (RefinementMap I J h NвВВ) := RefinementMapLE I J h NвВВ
  exact (UniqueGE I J NвВВ (RefinementMap I J h NвВБ) (RefinementMap I J h NвВВ) (вЯ®h_leвВБ, h_leвВВвЯ©)).symm

/-- If `N вЙ§ A` for some `A : I`, then `RefinementMap N = A`. -/
lemma SendsToUniqueGE (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (J : DirectSumDecomposition M)
    (h : IsRefinement J I) (N : J) (A : I) : N.val вЙ§ A вЖТ (RefinementMap I J h N) = A := by
  intro h_le
  let B : I := (RefinementMap I J h N)
  rw [UniqueGE I J N A B (вЯ®h_le, RefinementMapLE I J h NвЯ©)]

lemma RefinmentMapFunctorial (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (J : DirectSumDecomposition M)
    (K : DirectSumDecomposition M) (hij : IsRefinement J I) (hjk : IsRefinement K J)
    (hik : IsRefinement K I) (N : K) :
    RefinementMap I K hik N = RefinementMap I J hij (RefinementMap J K hjk N) := by
  have h_le : N.val вЙ§ RefinementMap I J hij (RefinementMap J K hjk N) := by
    apply le_trans (RefinementMapLE J K hjk N)
    exact (RefinementMapLE I J hij _)
  exact SendsToUniqueGE I K hik N (RefinementMap I J hij (RefinementMap J K hjk N)) h_le

/-- The refinement relation defines a preorder on direct sum decompositions of `M` via `DвВБ вЙ§ DвВВ` if
and only if `DвВБ` is a refinement of `DвВВ` i.e. this relation is reflexive and transitive. -/
instance : Preorder (DirectSumDecomposition M) where
  le DвВБ DвВВ := IsRefinement DвВБ DвВВ
  --DвВБ вЙ§ DвВВ iff DвВБ refines D

and `A, B` are submodules appearing in `I` such that `N вЙ§ A, B`. Then `A = B`. -/

/-- The refinement relation defines a preorder on direct sum decompositions of `M` via `DвВБ вЙ§ DвВВ` if
and only if `DвВБ` is a refinement of `DвВВ` i.e. this relation is reflexive and transitive. -/
instance : Preorder (DirectSumDecomposition M) where
  le DвВБ DвВВ := IsRefinement DвВБ DвВВ
  --DвВБ вЙ§ DвВВ iff DвВБ refines DвВВ.
  le_refl D := by intro N _; use {N}; aesop
  le_trans IвВБ IвВВ IвВГ h12 h23 := by
    intro N h_mem
    rcases (h23 h_mem) with вЯ®C, h_sub, h_eqвЯ©
    choose f hf hf' using h12
    let A := в®Ж (c : C), (f (h_sub c.prop))
    use A
    constructor
    ¬Ј apply iSup_le_iff.mpr
      intro c
      exact hf (h_sub c.prop)
    ¬Ј have h_aux' : sSup A = sSup C := by
        simp_rw [le_antisymm_iff, sSup_le_iff]
        constructor
        ¬Ј intro a h_a
          have h_aux'' : вИГ (c : C), a вИИ (f (h_sub c.prop)) := by aesop
          rcases h_aux'' with вЯ®c_a, h_caвЯ©
          have h_le : a вЙ§ c_a := by rw [hf' (N := c_a) (h_sub c_a.2)]; apply le_sSup h_ca
          apply le_sSup_of_le c_a.prop h_le
        intro c h_mem_c
        let c' : C := вЯ®c, h_mem_cвЯ©
        have h_le_c : c вЙ§ sSup (f (h_sub c'.prop)) := by
          rw [вЖР hf' (h_sub c'.prop)]
        apply le_trans h_le_c
        apply sSup_le
        intro a h_mem_a
        have h_a_in_A : a вИИ A := by
          have h_subs : f (h_sub c'.prop) вЙ§ A := by
            apply le_iSup_of_le c'
            exact le_rfl
          exact h_subs h_mem_a
        exact le_sSup h_a_in_A
      rwa [h_aux']

```tactics
import PersistentDecomp.Mathlib.Order.Disjoint
import PersistentDecomp.Prereqs.Indecomposable
import PersistentDecomp.Prereqs.PersistenceSubmodule

/-!

# Direct sum decompositions for persistence modules (dual order version)

In this file, we define the type of direct sum decompositions of a persistence module `M`.
This has a natural order given by refinements.

Relation to the material in `PersistentDecomp.DirectSumDecompositionDual.lean`:
here, we are considering the *dual order* of the one constructed in the other file.

-/

open CategoryTheory CategoryTheory.Limits DirectSum
open CompleteLattice hiding sSup_le -- TODO: Fix in mathlib

namespace Dual

variable {C : Type} [Category.{0, 0} C] {K : Type} [DivisionRing K] {M : C в•§ ModuleCat K}

variable (M) in
/-- A direct sum decomposition of `M ` is a set of non-zero submodules
that are linearly independent and whose supremum is the whole of `M`. -/
@[ext]
structure DirectSumDecomposition where
  carrier : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M)
  sSupIndep' : sSupIndep carrier
  sSup_eq_top' : sSup carrier = вК§
  not_bot_mem' : вК• вИЙ carrier

namespace DirectSumDecomposition

instance : SetLike (DirectSumDecomposition M) (PersistenceSubmodule M) where
  coe := carrier
  coe_injective' DвВБ DвВВ := by cases DвВБ; congr!

attribute [-instance] SetLike.instPartialOrder

protected lemma sSupIndep (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) : sSupIndep (SetLike.coe D) := D.sSupIndep'

lemma sSup_eq_top (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) : sSup (SetLike.coe D) = вК§ := D.sSup_eq_top'
lemma not_bot_mem (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) : вК• вИЙ D := D.not_bot_mem'

lemma pointwise_iSup_eq_top (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) (x : C) : в®Ж p вИИ D, p x = вК§ := sorry

lemma pointwise_sSup_eq_top (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) (x : C) : в®Ж p вИИ D, p x = вК§ := sorry

open scoped Classical in
lemma isInternal (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (c : C) :
    IsInternal (M := M.obj c) (S := Submodule K (M.obj c)) fun p : I вЖ¶ p.val c := by
  rw [DirectSum.isInternal_submodule_iff_iSupIndep_and_iSup_eq_top]
  constructor
  ¬Ј sorry
  sorry
  --rw [вЖР iSup_apply, вЖР sSup_eq_iSup', I.sSup_eq_top]
  --rfl

variable {M : C в•§ ModuleCat K} in
/-- Let `DвВБ, DвВВ` be direct sum decompositions of `M` we say that `DвВБ` is a refinement of `DвВВ` if for
every submodule `N` that appears in `D`, there is a subset `B` of submodules that appear
in `DвВБ` such that `вИС T вИИ B, T = N`. -/
def IsRefinement (DвВБ DвВВ : DirectSumDecomposition M) : Prop :=
  вИА в¶ГNв¶Д, N вИИ DвВВ вЖТ вИГ B : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M), B вКЖ DвВБ вИІ N = sSup B

variable {M : C в•§ ModuleCat K} in
/-- Suppose `I, J` are direct sum decompositions of `M ` and `J` is a refinement of `I`.
Then for any submodule `N` appearing in `J`, there is a submodule  `A` appearing in `I`
such that `N вЙ§ A`. -/
lemma RefinementMapSurj' (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (J : DirectSumDecomposition M)
  (h : IsRefinement J I) : вИА N : J, вИГ A : I, N.val вЙ§ A.val := by
  by_contra! h_contra
  rcases h_contra with вЯ®NвВА, h_not_leвЯ©
  have h_ge : NвВА.val вКФ sSup I вЙ§ sSup J := by
    rw [вЖР sSup_pair]
    apply sSup_le_iff.mpr
    intro b h_mem
    rcases h_mem with вЯ®h_nвЯ©
    ¬Ј exact (le_sSup (h_n вЦЄ NвВА.prop))
    ¬Ј rename b вИИ {sSup (SetLike.coe I)} => h_i
      have h' : sSup (SetLike.coe I) вЙ§ sSup J := by
        rw [I.sSup_eq_top, J.sSup_eq_top]
      simp only [Set.mem_singleton_iff] at h_i
      exact (h_i вЦЄ h')
  let B : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M) := {C | вИГ A : I, C вЙ§ A.val вИІ C вИИ J}

and `A, B` are submodules appearing in `I` such that `N вЙ§ A, B`. Then `A = B`. -/
lemma UniqueGE (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (J : DirectSumDecomposition M)
  (N : J) (A : I) (B : I) : N.val вЙ§ A вИІ N.val вЙ§ B вЖТ A = B := by
  by_contra h'
  push_neg at h'

    simp [h_neq]
  have h_disj : Disjoint A.val B.val := by

      intro X hx

      ¬Ј exact (h_mem вЦЄ A.prop)
      subst X
      exact B.prop
    exact (sSupIndep_pair h_neq').mp (sSupIndep.mono I.sSupIndep' h_sub)

  have h_eq_bot : N вЙ§ (вК• : PersistenceSubmodule M) := h_le'.trans <| disjoint_iff_inf_le.mp h_disj
  simp only [le_bot_iff] at h_eq_bot
  exact (J.not_bot_mem' (h_eq_bot вЦЄ N.prop))

The key insight is that we need to show that if `a вЙ§ x` and `a вЙ§ sSup(S \ {x})`, then `a вЙ§ вК•`. 

From `ha`, we have `a вЙ§ x`. 
From `ha'`, we have `a вЙ§ sSup(S \ {x})`. 

Since `x вИИ S`, we know that `x = sSup(B N hN)` for some `N вИИ D` and `hN`. 

Now, since `a вЙ§ sSup(S \ {x})`, and `x вИИ S`, we know that `a` must be less than or equal to some element in `S \ {x}`. 

However, we also have from `ha`, `a вЙ§ x`. 

The crucial property comes from `hB'` which states that for any `N вИИ D`, `sSupIndep (B N hN)`. 

Since `x = sSup (B N hN)`, we have `a вЙ§ sSup (B N hN)`. 

Now, we can apply the property of `sSupIndep`. If `a вЙ§ sSup S` and `S` is independent, then `a вЙ§ вК•`.

So we apply this property to `a` and `B N hN`. We have `a вЙ§ sSup (B N hN)` and `sSupIndep (B N hN)`. Therefore, `a вЙ§ вК•`.

@[ext]
structure DirectSumDecomposition where
  carrier : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M)
  sSupIndep' : sSupIndep carrier
  sSup_eq_top' : sSup carrier = вК§
  not_bot_mem' : вК• вИЙ carrier

namespace DirectSumDecomposition

instance : SetLike (DirectSumDecomposition M) (PersistenceSubmodule M) where
  coe := carrier
  coe_injective' DвВБ DвВВ := by cases DвВБ; congr!

attribute [-instance] SetLike.instPartialOrder

protected lemma sSupIndep (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) : sSupIndep (SetLike.coe D) := D.sSupIndep'

lemma sSup_eq_top (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) : sSup (SetLike.coe D) = вК§ := D.sSup_eq_top'
lemma not_bot_mem (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) : вК• вИЙ D := D.not_bot_mem'

lemma pointwise_iSup_eq_top (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) (x : C) : в®Ж p вИИ D, p x = вК§ := sorry

lemma pointwise_sSup_eq_top (D : DirectSumDecomposition M) (x : C) : в®Ж p вИИ D, p x = вК§ := sorry

open scoped Classical in
lemma isInternal (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (c : C) :
    IsInternal (M := M.obj c) (S := Submodule K (M.obj c)) fun p : I вЖ¶ p.val c := by
  rw [DirectSum.isInternal_submodule_iff_iSupIndep_and_iSup_eq_top]
  constructor
  ¬Ј sorry
  sorry
  --rw [вЖР iSup_apply, вЖР sSup_eq_iSup', I.sSup_eq_top]
  --rfl

variable {M : C в•§ ModuleCat K} in
/-- Let `DвВБ, DвВВ` be direct sum decomposition of `M` we say that `DвВБ` is a refinement of `DвВВ` if for
every submodule `N` that appears in `D`, there is a subset `B` of submodules that appear
in `DвВБ` such that `вИС T вИИ B, T = N`. -/
def IsRefinement (DвВБ DвВВ : DirectSumDecomposition M) : Prop :=
  вИА в¶ГNв¶Д, N вИИ DвВВ вЖТ вИГ B : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M), B вКЖ DвВБ вИІ N = sSup B

variable {M : C в•§ ModuleCat K} in
/-- Suppose `I, J` are direct sum decompositions of `M ` and `J` is a refinement of `I`.
Then for any submodule `N` appearing in `J`, there is a submodule  `A` appearing in `I`
such that `N вЙ§ A`. -/
lemma RefinementMapSurj' (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (J : DirectSumDecomposition M)
  (h : IsRefinement J I) : вИА N : J, вИГ A : I, N.val вЙ§ A.val := by
  by_contra! h_contra
  rcases h_contra with вЯ®NвВА, h_not_leвЯ©
  have h_ge : NвВА.val вКФ sSup I вЙ§ sSup J := by
    rw [вЖР sSup_pair]
    apply sSup_le_iff.mpr
    intro b h_mem
    rcases h_mem with вЯ®h_nвЯ©
    ¬Ј exact (le_sSup (h_n вЦЄ NвВА.prop))
    ¬Ј rename b вИИ {sSup (SetLike.coe I)} => h_i
      have h' : sSup (SetLike.coe I) вЙ§ sSup J := by
        rw [I.sSup_eq_top, J.sSup_eq_top]
      simp only [Set.mem_singleton_iff] at h_i
      exact (h_i вЦЄ h')
  let B : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M) := {C | вИГ A : I, C вЙ§ A.val вИІ C вИИ J}
  have h_sub : B вКЖ J := by
    intro C h_C_mem
    simp [B] at h_C_mem
    exact h_C_mem.right
  have h_aux : sSup B = sSup I := by
    simp_rw [le_antisymm_iff, sSup_le_iff]
    constructor
    ¬Ј intro b h_mem
      simp only [exists_and_right, Subtype.exists, exists_prop, Set.mem_setOf_eq, B] at h_mem
      rcases h_mem with вЯ®hвВБ, _вЯ©
      rcases hвВБ with вЯ®a, h_a, h_leвЯ©
      exact le_sSup_of_le h_a h_le
    have h_le_subset : вИА A : I, вИГ C вКЖ B, A вЙ§ sSup C := by
      intro A
      choose f hf hf' using h
      refine вЯ®f A.prop, ?_, by rw [вЖР hf' A.prop]вЯ©
      intro ќ± h_ќ±
      simp only [exists_and_right, Subtype.exists, exists_prop, Set.mem_setOf_eq, B]
      refine вЯ®вЯ®A, A.prop, ?_вЯ©, hf A.prop h_ќ±вЯ©
      rw [hf' A.prop]
      exact le_sSup h_ќ±
    intro A h_A_mem
    rcases h_le_subset вЯ®A, h_A_memвЯ© with вЯ®C, h_CвЯ©
    simp only at h_C
    exact le_trans h_C.right (sSup_le_sSup h_C.left)
  have h_aux' : NвВА.val вИЙ B := by
    intro h_contra
    simp only [exists_and_right, Subtype.exists, exists_prop, Set.mem_setOf_eq, SetLike.coe_mem,
      and_true, B] at h_contra
    rcases h_contra with вЯ®A, hвВБ, hвВВвЯ©
    exact (h_not_le (вЯ®A, hвВБвЯ©) hвВВ)
  have h_disj : Disjoint NвВА.val (sSup B) := by
    exact (sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup J.sSupIndep' NвВА.prop h_sub h_aux')
  have h_not_bot : NвВА.val вЙ† вК• := by
    intro h_contra
    exact J.not_bot_mem (h_contra вЦЄ NвВА.prop)
  have h_gt : sSup I < NвВА.val вКФ sSup I := by
    rw [вЖР h_aux]
    -- No clue why I couldn't use this theorem from mathlib directly and had to copy paste it here
    -- instead assuming it has to do with needing to bump
    exact (right_lt_sup_of_left_ne_bot h_disj h_not_bot)
  have contra : (вК§ : PersistenceSubmodule M) < вК§ := by
    rw [I.sSup_eq_top, J.sSup_eq_top] at *
    apply lt_of_lt_of_le h_gt h_ge
  exact (lt_self_iff_false (вК§ : PersistenceSubmodule M)).mp contra

/-- Suppose that `I, J` are direct sum decompositions of `M`, `N` is a submodule appearing in `J`
and `A, B` are submodules appearing in `I` such that `N вЙ§ A, B`. Then `A = B`. -/
lemma UniqueGE (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (J : DirectSumDecomposition M)
  (N : J) (A : I) (B : I) : N.val вЙ§ A вИІ N.val вЙ§ B вЖТ A = B := by
  by_contra h'
  push_neg at h'
  rcases h' with вЯ®h_le, h_neqвЯ©
  have h_neq' : A.val вЙ† B.val := by
    simp [h_neq]
  have h_disj : Disjoint A.val B.val := by
    let s : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M) := {A.val, B.val}
    have h_sub : s вЙ§ I.carrier := by
      intro X hx
      rcases hx with вЯ®h_memвЯ©
      ¬Ј exact (h_mem вЦЄ A.prop)
      subst X
      exact B.prop
    exact (sSupIndep_pair h_neq').mp (sSupIndep.mono I.sSupIndep' h_sub)
  have h_le' : N.val вЙ§ A.val вКУ B.val := le_inf h_le.1 h_le.2
  have h_eq_bot : N вЙ§ (вК• : PersistenceSubmodule M) := h_le'.trans <| disjoint_iff_inf_le.mp h_disj
  simp only [le_bot_iff] at h_eq_bot
  exact (J.not_bot_mem' (h_eq_bot вЦЄ N.prop))

/-- Let `I, J` be direct sum decompositions of `M` with `J` a refinement of `I`. Then
`RefinementMap` is the function that sends a submodule `N` appearing in `J` to the unique submodule
in `I` that contains `N`. -/
noncomputable def RefinementMap (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (J : DirectSumDecomposition M)
  (h : IsRefinement J I) : J вЖТ I :=
  open scoped Classical in
  if h' : I = J then by
    intro N
    use N
    exact (h' вЦЄ N.prop)
  else by
    intro N
    choose A h using (RefinementMapSurj' I J h N)
    exact A

@[simp]
lemma RefinementMapId (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (h : IsRefinement I I) (N : I) :
  (RefinementMap I I h) N = N := by
  simp [RefinementMap]

/-- `RefinmentMap N` sends `N` to something it is included in. -/
lemma RefinementMapLE (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (J : DirectSumDecomposition M)
  (h : IsRefinement J I) : вИА N : J, N.val вЙ§ (RefinementMap I J h N).val := by
  classical
  obtain rfl | hIJ := eq_or_ne I J
  ¬Ј simp [RefinementMapId]
  ¬Ј intro N
    simpa [RefinementMap, hIJ] using Exists.choose_spec (RefinementMapSurj' I J h N)

/-- Two modules that both decompose the same element are sent to the same submodule by the
`RefinementMap`. -/
lemma RefinementMapSameImage (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (J : DirectSumDecomposition M)
    (h : IsRefinement J I) (NвВБ NвВВ : J) (h_leвВБ : NвВВ.val вЙ§ RefinementMap I J h NвВБ) :
    RefinementMap I J h NвВВ = RefinementMap I J h NвВБ := by
  have h_leвВВ : NвВВ.val вЙ§ (RefinementMap I J h NвВВ) := RefinementMapLE I J h NвВВ
  exact (UniqueGE I J NвВВ (RefinementMap I J h NвВБ) (RefinementMap I J h NвВВ) (вЯ®h_leвВБ, h_leвВВвЯ©)).symm

/-- If `N вЙ§ A` for some `A : I`, then `RefinementMap N = A`. -/
lemma SendsToUniqueGE (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (J : DirectSumDecomposition M)
    (h : IsRefinement J I) (N : J) (A : I) : N.val вЙ§ A вЖТ (RefinementMap I J h N) = A := by
  intro h_le
  let B : I := (RefinementMap I J h N)
  rw [UniqueGE I J N A B (вЯ®h_le, RefinementMapLE I J h NвЯ©)]

lemma RefinmentMapFunctorial (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (J : DirectSumDecomposition M)
    (K : DirectSumDecomposition M) (hij : IsRefinement J I) (hjk : IsRefinement K J)
    (hik : IsRefinement K I) (N : K) :
    RefinementMap I K hik N = RefinementMap I J hij (RefinementMap J K hjk N) := by
  have h_le : N.val вЙ§ RefinementMap I J hij (RefinementMap J K hjk N) := by
    apply le_trans (RefinementMapLE J K hjk N)
    exact (RefinementMapLE I J hij _)
  exact SendsToUniqueGE I K hik N (RefinementMap I J hij (RefinementMap J K hjk N)) h_le

/-- The refinement relation defines a preorder on direct sum decompositions of `M` via `DвВБ вЙ§ DвВВ` if
and only if `DвВБ` is a refinement of `DвВВ` i.e. this relation is reflexive and transitive. -/
instance : Preorder (DirectSumDecomposition M) where
  le DвВБ DвВВ := IsRefinement DвВБ DвВВ
  --DвВБ вЙ§ DвВВ iff DвВБ refines DвВВ.
  le_refl D := by intro N _; use {N}; aesop
  le_trans IвВБ IвВВ IвВГ h12 h23 := by
    intro N h_mem
    rcases (h23 h_mem) with вЯ®C, h_sub, h_eqвЯ©
    choose f hf hf' using h12
    let A := в®Ж (c : C), (f (h_sub c.prop))
    use A
    constructor
    ¬Ј apply iSup_le_iff.mpr
      intro c
      exact hf (h_sub c.prop)
    ¬Ј have h_aux' : sSup A = sSup C := by
        simp_rw [le_antisymm_iff, sSup_le_iff]
        constructor
        ¬Ј intro a h_a
          have h_aux'' : вИГ (c : C), a вИИ (f (h_sub c.prop)) := by aesop
          rcases h_aux'' with вЯ®c_a, h_caвЯ©
          have h_le : a вЙ§ c_a := by rw [hf' (N := c_a) (h_sub c_a.2)]; apply le_sSup h_ca
          apply le_sSup_of_le c_a.prop h_le
        intro c h_mem_c
        let c' : C := вЯ®c, h_mem_cвЯ©
        have h_le_c : c вЙ§ sSup (f (h_sub c'.prop)) := by
          rw [вЖР hf' (h_sub c'.prop)]
        apply le_trans h_le_c
        apply sSup_le
        intro a h_mem_a
        have h_a_in_A : a вИИ A := by
          have h_subs : f (h_sub c'.prop) вЙ§ A := by
            apply le_iSup_of_le c'
            exact le_rfl
          exact h_subs h_mem_a
        exact le_sSup h_a_in_A
      rwa [h_aux']

/-- The refinement relation is antisymmetric. This (combined with the above)
means that it defines a partial order on direct sum decompositions. -/
instance DirectSumDecompLE : PartialOrder (DirectSumDecomposition M) where
  le_antisymm := by
    intro I J h_J_le_I h_I_le_J
    have h_final_left : вИА N вИИ J, N вИИ I := by
      intro N
      by_contra h_neg
      push_neg at h_neg
      rcases h_neg with вЯ®h_N_in_J, h_N_not_in_IвЯ©
      let N' : J := вЯ®N, h_N_in_JвЯ©
      have h_A : вИГ A : I, N вЙ§ A.val := by
        exact (RefinementMapSurj' I J h_I_le_J) N'
      rcases h_A with вЯ®A, h_N_le_AвЯ©
      choose f hf hf' using h_J_le_I
      let h_BвВБ := hf' N'.prop
      let h_BвВВ := hf N'.prop
      simp only at h_BвВБ
      have h_mem : A.val вИИ f N'.prop := by
        by_contra h_A_not_mem
        have h_aux : Disjoint A.val (sSup (f N'.prop)) := by
          exact (I.sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup A.prop h_BвВВ h_A_not_mem)
        have h_aux' : sSup (f N'.prop) вЙ§ A.val := h_BвВБ вЦЄ h_N_le_A
        have h_last : sSup (f N'.prop) = (вК• : PersistenceSubmodule M) := by
          rw [disjoint_comm] at h_aux
          exact (Disjoint.eq_bot_of_le h_aux h_aux')
        rw [вЖР h_BвВБ] at h_last
        subst h_last
        exact (J.not_bot_mem h_N_in_J)
      have h_A_le_N : A.val вЙ§ N := by
        simpa [вЖР h_BвВБ] using le_sSup h_mem
      have h_A_eq_N : A.val = N := by
        exact (le_antisymm h_A_le_N h_N_le_A)
      have h_contra : N вИИ I := by
        exact h_A_eq_N вЦЄ A.prop
      aesop
    have h_final_right : вИА N вИИ I, N вИИ J := by
      sorry
    aesop

lemma RefinementMapLE (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (J : DirectSumDecomposition M)
  (h : IsRefinement J I) : вИА N : J, N.val вЙ§ (RefinementMap I J h N).val := by

`RefinementMap`. -/

    RefinementMap I J h NвВВ = RefinementMap I J h NвВБ := by
  have h_leвВВ : NвВВ.val вЙ§ (RefinementMap I J h NвВВ) := RefinementMapLE I J h NвВВ
  exact (UniqueGE I J NвВВ (RefinementMap I J h NвВБ) (RefinementMap I J h NвВВ) (вЯ®h_leвВБ, h_leвВВвЯ©)).symm

lemma SendsToUniqueGE (I : DirectSumDecomposition M) (J : DirectSumDecomposition M)

The goal `a вЙ§ вК•` is a contradiction, as `a` is a non-zero submodule. The proof should establish this contradiction rather than using `sorry`.

To fix this error, we need to provide a concrete proof for `a вЙ§ вК•`. The hypotheses available are:

To prove `a вЙ§ вК•`, we can show that `a` itself is in the set `(вЛГ N, вЛГ (hN : N вИИ D), B N hN) \ {x}`. If `a` is in this set, then `ha'` implies `a вЙ§ вК•`.

We can prove `a вИИ (вЛГ N, вЛГ (hN : N вИИ D), B N hN) \ {x}` by showing:
1. `a вИИ вЛГ N, вЛГ (hN : N вИИ D), B N hN` (i.e., `a` is in the first part of the set difference)
2. `a вИЙ {x}` (i.e., `a` is not in the second part of the set difference)

Looking at the structure of the set `вЛГ N, вЛГ (hN : N вИИ D), B N hN`:
- For any `N вИИ D`, `B N hN` is a set of submodules.
